name: What happens if my firm wins despite AI fake citations getting flagged?
description: Sanctions persist; Rule 11 independent of case outcome.[1]

mainEntity.name: What happens if my firm wins despite AI fake citations getting flagged?

acceptedAnswer.text: Sanctions persist; Rule 11 independent of case outcome.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Sanctions still apply independently; victory doesn't erase Rule 11 violation. Levidow persisted post-flagging, earning bad faith finding.[1] Key factors: initial submission intent, response to scrutiny. Argue good faith, but courts prioritize integrity. Expect fines regardless.
